meeting_title: Meridian Works Operations / Voxel - use case discussion

safety_use_cases.label: Deploy Voxel safety computer vision at distribution centers
safety_use_cases.description: Meridian Works Operations wants to proceed now with Voxel’s existing safety AI while longer-term adjacent capabilities are explored.

evidence.quote: Yeah, his guidance was to continue on with Voxel, like as we're going to go with you guys, you know, for the safety.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: But, no, I hope that we can move forward with safety.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: There are tons of safety AI vendors.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: Bring them in. Get the current product out and working.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Sensitive product condition monitoring
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Meridian Works Operations is exploring a camera-based solution to monitor packaging state across facilities with varied requirements.

evidence.quote: But then we add this inventory-monitoring need to it.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: And now we are doing something with AI at Meridian Works Operations.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: So we have to do some, it's called emissivity testing.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: We're going to have to do some testing to see if these cameras are sensitive enough for that use case.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: And if it doesn't, then that approach may not work for us.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>

evidence.quote: he said this imaging approach is different from standard video, so there are additional technical considerations involved.
evidence.speaker: Lane Oakley <fake.lane.oakley@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: one of the vendors has a newer camera product with onboard AI capabilities.
evidence.speaker: Jensen Ellison <fake.jensen.ellison@meridianworksoperations.com>
